description: Response shape for GET /v1/fix/runs/{run_id} (ADR-055 D2). The result field carries a FixRunResult (contracts.fix_run_result) whose shape is discriminated by kind. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class FixRunResponse.

kind.description: Fix run kind discriminator. Values: atomic, flow, modularity, quality_check. Matches FixRunResult.kind.

fix_id.description: The fix action_id that was executed (e.g. 'fix.imports'). Null for flow-kind runs.

target_files.description: Files the fix was restricted to. Null means action default scope was applied.

write.description: Whether the fix was applied (true) or dry-run only (false). ADR-014.

requested_by.description: Username or agent identifier that triggered this run. Null for anonymous / daemon-initiated runs.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run was requested.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution began.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution completed.

result.description: FixRunResult JSONB payload (contracts.fix_run_result). Present when status=completed|failed; null while pending|executing.

error.description: Error message if status=failed. Null on success.
